name: ruby-net-http-digest-auth
title: ruby-net-http-digest-auth
description:
RFC 2617 Digest Access Authentication implementation
Stand-alone Ruby library implementing Digest Access
Authentication. This package is completely independent (and does not
fully integrate with) Net::HTTP.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ruby-net-http-digest-auth because RFC 2617 Digest Access Authentication implementation.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ruby-net-http-digest-auth as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-net-http-digest-auth with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-net-http-digest-auth --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
